arts.ttl: DFB Committee reviewing Leroy Sané elbow on Pascal Groß from 1-1 draw between Bayern Munich, Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Bayern might have come away with a vital point after a spirited second-half fight back, but there could yet be punishment doled out for an incident involving Leroy Sané and Dortmund’s Pascal Groß. Per information from Bild (via @iMiaSanMia ) a DFB control committee is now reviewing the incident from the match to determine if there will be any punishment sent in the direction of Sané.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Bayer Leverkusen: Live stream, game time thread, prediction, how to watch
arts.sum: In his short yet successful tenure as manager at Bayer Leverkusen, Xabi Alonso has never lost to his former club, Bayern Munich . Bayern has only scored multiple goals once in its last five matches, but the defense has been stellar in keeping opponents off the board.

arts.ttl: Sacha Boey wants to remain at Bayern Munich amid Marseille interest
arts.sum: In their search for defensive reinforcements this January, Olympique de Marseille have turned their attention to Bayern Munich’s Sacha Boey (24), according to L’Équipe, however, according to Foot Mercato, Les Phocéens may find it difficult…

arts.ttl: Adam Aznou on his way out? Bayern Munich reportedly discussing potential loan move for the Moroccan left-back
arts.sum: Internally, FC Bayern is currently discussing a loan for Adam Aznou. Youth academy graduate Adam Aznou, a name fairly familiar amongst Bayern Munich fans despite his limited minutes for the first team, has featured in most Bayern Munich match day rosters in 2024 and even made his debut for Die Roten in November.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich in fresh contract talks with Leroy Sane amid Arsenal & Man Utd links
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are reported to have held fresh talks with Leroy Sane over extending his expiring contract, although he could still be sold when the transfer window opens next month.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich head coach, Vincent Kompany, not planning on doing “anything differently” amidst hot run of form
arts.sum: In an interview with ransport’s Martin Volkmar, Bayern head coach, Vincent Kompany, explained that it wasn’t the result that made the difference, it was his side’s response (via @iMiaSanMia ). We won’t do anything differently now than we did after the Barcelona game, where we always knew: we have talent, we have good players, but we have to work,” Kompany said.

arts.ttl: Injury return timelines becoming more clear for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Josip #Stanisic is expected to rejoin team training later this month following his lateral ligament tear in his right knee, according to the current plan. His return to team training is currently planned for the first session of the new year on January 2nd.

arts.ttl: Max Eberl doesn’t mind presence of Bayern Munich’s old guard
arts.sum: One might think Bayern Munich board member for sport Max Eberl could be annoyed by the prominent presence of Uli Hoeneß and Karl-Heinz Rummenigge at the club. “We don’t need to talk about Uli Hoeneß’s life’s work, or even Karl-Heinz Rummenigge’s.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich interested in signing German top talent Tom Bischof on free transfer
arts.sum: Tom Bischof has been hailed as one of Germany’s top young talents for many years now, with the TSG Hoffenheim youngster admired for his incredible technique and passing ability. Bayern have already inquired about the 19 y/o top talent from TSG Hoffenheim as they are interested in signing him next summer.

arts.ttl: Marseille considering move to sign Bayern Munich’s Sacha Boey
arts.sum: Olympique de Marseille, second in Ligue 1 and seven points behind leaders Paris Saint-Germain, are looking to strengthen their squad in January. The club’s defence is currently seen as the…
